name: ascension
description: Merged AI development framework — god mode breadth + Superpowers depth

plugins.name: ascension
plugins.description: 36 composable skills fusing god mode's breadth (reference-first design, agent orchestration, UX/security/architecture) with Superpowers' subagent-driven execution (file handoffs, compaction-safe progress ledgers) and a zero-dependency visual brainstorming companion.
